option.name: filePath
option.value: /Offert (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /Product (snapshot).java

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<Form version="1.3" maxVersion="1.9" type="org.netbeans.modules.form.forminfo.JFrameFormInfo"> <Properties> <Property name="defaultCloseOperation" type="int" value="3"/> </Properties> <SyntheticProperties> <SyntheticProperty name="formSizePolicy" type="int" value="1"/> <SyntheticProperty name="generateCenter" type="boolean" value="false"/> </SyntheticProperties> <AuxValues> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_autoResourcing" type="java.lang.Integer" value="0"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_autoSetComponentName" type="java.lang.Boolean" value="false"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_generateFQN" type="java.lang.Boolean" value="true"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_generateMnemonicsCode" type="java.lang.Boolean" value="false"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_i18nAutoMode" type="java.lang.Boolean" value="false"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_layoutCodeTarget" type="java.lang.Integer" value="1"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_listenerGenerationStyle" type="java.lang.Integer" value="0"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_variablesLocal" type="java.lang.Boolean" value="false"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_variablesModifier" type="java.lang.Integer" value="2"/> </AuxValues>

<Component id="jLabel2" min="-2" max="-2" attributes="0"/> <EmptySpace pref="265" max="32767" attributes="0"/> <Component id="botonEnvio" min="-2" max="-2" attributes="0"/> </Group> <Group type="102" id="codigoTareaTF" alignment="3" min="-2" max="-2" attributes="0"/> <Component id="jLabel3" alignment="3" min="-2" max="-2" attributes="0"/> </Group> <EmptySpace type="separate" max="-2" attributes="0"/> </Group> <EmptySpace min="-2" pref="12" max="-2" attributes="0"/> <Group type="103" groupAlignment="0" max="-2" attributes="0"> <Component id="jLabel4" max="32767" attributes="0"/> id="jScrollPane2" min="-2" pref="209" max="-2" attributes="0"/> <EmptySpace min="-2" pref="15" max="-2" attributes="0"/> </Group> </Group> </DimensionLayout> </Layout> <SubComponents> <Component class="javax.swing.JLabel" name="jLabel1"> <Properties> <Property name="text" type="java.lang.String" value="Descripción"/> </Properties> </Component> <Container class="javax.swing.JScrollPane" name="jScrollPane1">
<Layout class="org.netbeans.modules.form.compat2.layouts.support.JScrollPaneSupportLayout"/> <SubComponents> <Component class="javax.swing.JTextArea" name="descripcionTareaTF"> <Properties> <Property name="columns" type="int" value="20"/> <Property name="rows" type="int" value="5"/> </Properties> </Component> </SubComponents> </Container> <Component class="javax.swing.JButton" name="botonEnvio"> <Properties> <Property name="text" type="java.lang.String" value="Enviar"/> <Property name="name" type="java.lang.String" value="botonEnvio" noResource="true"/> </Properties> <Events> <EventHandler event="actionPerformed" listener="java.awt.event.ActionListener" parameters="java.awt.event.ActionEvent" handler="botonEnvioActionPerformed"/> </Events> </Component> <Container class="javax.swing.JScrollPane" name="jScrollPane2">
<Layout class="org.netbeans.modules.form.compat2.layouts.support.JScrollPaneSupportLayout"/> </Container> <Component class="javax.swing.JLabel" name="jLabel2"> <Properties> <Property name="text" type="java.lang.String" value="Propuestas aceptadas"/> </Properties> </Component> <Component class="javax.swing.JTextField" name="codigoTareaTF"> <Events> <EventHandler event="actionPerformed" listener="java.awt.event.ActionListener" parameters="java.awt.event.ActionEvent" handler="codigoTareaTFActionPerformed"/> </Events> </Component> <Component class="javax.swing.JLabel" name="jLabel3"> <Properties> <Property name="text" type="java.lang.String" value="Código del producto"/> </Properties> </Component> <Component class="javax.swing.JTextField" name="startPriceField"> <Properties> <Property name="text" type="java.lang.String" editor="org.netbeans.modules.form.RADConnectionPropertyEditor"> <Connection code="""" type="code"/> </Property> </Properties> </Component> <Component class="javax.swing.JLabel" name="jLabel4"> <Properties> <Property name="text" type="java.lang.String" value="Precio inicial"/> </Properties> </Component> </SubComponents> </Form>

<Form version="1.3" maxVersion="1.9" type="org.netbeans.modules.form.forminfo.JFrameFormInfo"> <Properties> <Property name="defaultCloseOperation" type="int" value="3"/> </Properties> <SyntheticProperties> <SyntheticProperty name="formSizePolicy" type="int" value="1"/> <SyntheticProperty name="generateCenter" type="boolean" value="false"/> </SyntheticProperties> <AuxValues> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_autoResourcing" type="java.lang.Integer" value="0"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_autoSetComponentName" type="java.lang.Boolean" value="false"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_generateFQN" type="java.lang.Boolean" value="true"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_generateMnemonicsCode" type="java.lang.Boolean" value="false"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_i18nAutoMode" type="java.lang.Boolean" value="false"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_layoutCodeTarget" type="java.lang.Integer" value="1"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_listenerGenerationStyle" type="java.lang.Integer" value="0"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_variablesLocal" type="java.lang.Boolean" value="false"/> <AuxValue name="FormSettings_variablesModifier" type="java.lang.Integer" value="2"/> </AuxValues>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:aop="http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop" xmlns:c="http://www.springframework.org/schema/c" xmlns:context="http://www.springframework.org/schema/context" xmlns:rabbit="http://www.springframework.org/schema/rabbit" xmlns:p="http://www.springframework.org/schema/p"
xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans-4.0.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop/spring-aop-4.0.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/context http://www.springframework.org/schema/context/spring-context-4.0.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/rabbit http://www.springframework.org/schema/rabbit/spring-rabbit-1.0.xsd">
<!--RMI configuration-->
<bean id="manejadorOfertas" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.remote.ManejadorOfertas"> <property name="fachadaPersistenciaOfertas" ref="fachadaPersistenciaOfertas" /> </bean>
<bean class="org.springframework.remoting.rmi.RmiServiceExporter"> <property name="serviceName" value="servicioManejoOfertas"/> <property name="service" ref="manejadorOfertas"/> <property name="serviceInterface" value="edu.eci.arsw.exam.remote.ManejadorOfertasStub"/> <property name="registryPort" value="1199"/> </bean>
<!-- first following line creates a rabbit connection factory with specified parameters --> <rabbit:connection-factory id="connectionFactory" host="localhost" username="guest" password="guest" /> <!-- obtain admin rights to create the an exchange --> <rabbit:admin connection-factory="connectionFactory" />
<!-- create a queue for incoming buyer offers --> <rabbit:queue id="offertQueue" name="offert.queue" />
<!-- declare exchange and bind incoming offers to offertQueue --> <rabbit:topic-exchange id="qdmExchange" name="QDM-EXCHANGE"> <rabbit:bindings> <rabbit:binding queue="offertQueue" pattern="offert.submit" /> </rabbit:bindings> </rabbit:topic-exchange>
<!-- create a bean which can send message to QDM-EXCHANGE for the Java program to call --> <rabbit:template id="producerTemplate" connection-factory="connectionFactory" exchange="QDM-EXCHANGE"/>
<bean id="producer" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.events.OffertMessageProducer"> <property name="amqpTemplate" ref="producerTemplate"></property> </bean>
<bean id="offertMessageListener" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.events.OffertMessageListener"> <property name="manejadorOfertas" ref="manejadorOfertas" /> <property name="mainFrame" ref="mainFrame" /> </bean>
<rabbit:listener-container id="offertListenerContainer" connection-factory="connectionFactory"> <rabbit:listener ref="offertMessageListener" queues="offertQueue" /> </rabbit:listener-container>
<bean id="mainFrame" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.MainFrame"> <property name="messageProducer" ref="producer"/> <property name="fachadaPersistenciaOfertas" ref="fachadaPersistenciaOfertas"/> </bean>
<bean id="fachadaPersistenciaOfertas" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.FachadaPersistenciaOfertas" />
</beans>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:aop="http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop" xmlns:c="http://www.springframework.org/schema/c" xmlns:context="http://www.springframework.org/schema/context" xmlns:rabbit="http://www.springframework.org/schema/rabbit" xmlns:p="http://www.springframework.org/schema/p"
xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans-4.0.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop/spring-aop-4.0.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/context http://www.springframework.org/schema/context/spring-context-4.0.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/rabbit http://www.springframework.org/schema/rabbit/spring-rabbit-1.0.xsd">
<!--RMI configuration-->
<bean id="manejadorOfertas" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.remote.ManejadorOfertas"> <property name="fachadaPersistenciaOfertas" ref="fachadaPersistenciaOfertas" /> </bean>
<bean class="org.springframework.remoting.rmi.RmiServiceExporter"> <property name="serviceName" value="servicioManejoOfertas"/> <property name="service" ref="manejadorOfertas"/> <property name="serviceInterface" value="edu.eci.arsw.exam.remote.ManejadorOfertasStub"/> <property name="registryPort" value="1199"/> </bean>
<!-- first following line creates a rabbit connection factory with specified parameters --> <rabbit:connection-factory id="connectionFactory" host="localhost" username="guest" password="guest" /> <!-- obtain admin rights to create the an exchange --> <rabbit:admin connection-factory="connectionFactory" />
<!-- create a queue for incoming buyer offers --> <rabbit:queue id="offertQueue" name="offert.queue" />
<!-- declare exchange and bind incoming offers to offertQueue --> <rabbit:topic-exchange id="qdmExchange" name="QDM-EXCHANGE"> <rabbit:bindings> <rabbit:binding queue="offertQueue" pattern="offert.submit" /> </rabbit:bindings> </rabbit:topic-exchange>
<!-- create a bean which can send message to QDM-EXCHANGE for the Java program to call --> <rabbit:template id="producerTemplate" connection-factory="connectionFactory" exchange="QDM-EXCHANGE"/>
<bean id="producer" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.events.OffertMessageProducer"> <property name="amqpTemplate" ref="producerTemplate"></property> </bean>
<bean id="offertMessageListener" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.events.OffertMessageListener"> <property name="manejadorOfertas" ref="manejadorOfertas" /> <property name="mainFrame" ref="mainFrame" /> <property name="fachadaPersistenciaOfertas" ref="fachadaPersistenciaOfertas" /> <property name="messageProducer" ref="producer" /> </bean>
<rabbit:listener-container id="offertListenerContainer" connection-factory="connectionFactory"> <rabbit:listener ref="offertMessageListener" queues="offertQueue" /> </rabbit:listener-container>
<bean id="mainFrame" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.MainFrame"> <property name="messageProducer" ref="producer"/> <property name="fachadaPersistenciaOfertas" ref="fachadaPersistenciaOfertas"/> </bean>
<bean id="fachadaPersistenciaOfertas" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.FachadaPersistenciaOfertas" />
</beans>

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:aop="http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop" xmlns:c="http://www.springframework.org/schema/c" xmlns:context="http://www.springframework.org/schema/context" xmlns:p="http://www.springframework.org/schema/p" xmlns:rabbit="http://www.springframework.org/schema/rabbit" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans-4.0.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/rabbit http://www.springframework.org/schema/rabbit/spring-rabbit-1.0.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop/spring-aop-4.0.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/context http://www.springframework.org/schema/context/spring-context-4.0.xsd">
<rabbit:connection-factory id="connectionFactory" host="localhost" username="guest" password="guest" /> <rabbit:admin connection-factory="connectionFactory" /> <!-- Create myAnonymousQueue queue --> <rabbit:queue id="myAnonymousQueue" /> <!-- create myExchange and bind myAnonymousQueue with my.routingkey.1 to the PC-EXCHANGE--> <rabbit:topic-exchange id="myExchange" name="QDM-EXCHANGE"> <rabbit:bindings> <rabbit:binding queue="myAnonymousQueue" pattern="my.#.*"> </rabbit:binding> </rabbit:bindings> </rabbit:topic-exchange>
<!-- instantiate AmqpListener a POJO that implements the message listener --> <bean id="messageListener" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.events.OffertMessageListener"> <property name="amqpTemplate" ref="amqpTemplate"/> </bean> <!-- glue the listener and myAnonymousQueue to the container--> <rabbit:listener-container id="myListenerContainer" connection-factory="connectionFactory"> <rabbit:listener ref="messageListener" queues="myAnonymousQueue" /> </rabbit:listener-container>
<rabbit:template id="amqpTemplate" connection-factory="connectionFactory"/>
</beans>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:aop="http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop" xmlns:c="http://www.springframework.org/schema/c" xmlns:context="http://www.springframework.org/schema/context" xmlns:p="http://www.springframework.org/schema/p" xmlns:rabbit="http://www.springframework.org/schema/rabbit" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans-4.0.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/rabbit http://www.springframework.org/schema/rabbit/spring-rabbit-1.0.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop/spring-aop-4.0.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/context http://www.springframework.org/schema/context/spring-context-4.0.xsd">
<rabbit:connection-factory id="connectionFactory" host="localhost" username="guest" password="guest" /> <rabbit:admin connection-factory="connectionFactory" />
<!-- Queue for product publications --> <rabbit:queue id="myAnonymousQueue" /> <!-- Queue for winner notifications (each buyer gets its own anonymous queue) --> <rabbit:queue id="winnerQueue" />
<rabbit:topic-exchange id="myExchange" name="QDM-EXCHANGE"> <rabbit:bindings> <rabbit:binding queue="myAnonymousQueue" pattern="my.#.*" /> <rabbit:binding queue="winnerQueue" pattern="auction.winner" /> </rabbit:bindings> </rabbit:topic-exchange>
<bean id="messageListener" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.events.OffertMessageListener"> <property name="amqpTemplate" ref="amqpTemplate"/> </bean>
<bean id="winningOfferListener" class="edu.eci.arsw.exam.events.WinningOfferListener"/>
<rabbit:listener-container id="myListenerContainer" connection-factory="connectionFactory"> <rabbit:listener ref="messageListener" queues="myAnonymousQueue" /> <rabbit:listener ref="winningOfferListener" queues="winnerQueue" /> </rabbit:listener-container>
<rabbit:template id="amqpTemplate" connection-factory="connectionFactory"/>
</beans>
